basic_details.job_title: Delhi University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Training Coordinator, Office Assistant and More
basic_details.post_name: Training Coordinator, Office Assistant, Computer Lab Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Delhi University Training Coordinator, Office Assistant, and Computer Lab Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.du.ac.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the Delhi University Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech/MCA (Desirable: MBA (IT)), BCA/BSc(Computer Science/IT) or graduate with one year diploma in computer application, BCA / B.Sc. (IT/CS/Electronics) / Diploma in Computer Engineering or related field
qualification.details: Training Coordinator: B.E./B.Tech/MCA (Desirable: MBA (IT)) Office Assistant: BCA/BSc(Computer Science/IT) or graduate with one year diploma in computer application Computer Lab Assistant: BCA / B.Sc. (IT/CS/Electronics) / Diploma in Computer Engineering or related field

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹1,00,000 per month (first year) with gross 10% increase on annual basis (Training Coordinator), ₹25,000 per month with gross 10% increase on annual basis (Office Assistant), ₹20,000 per month with gross 10% increase on annual basis (Computer Lab Assistant)
salary_details.details: Training Coordinator: ₹1,00,000 per month (first year) with gross 10% increase on annual basis Office Assistant: ₹25,000 per month with gross 10% increase on annual basis Computer Lab Assistant: ₹20,000 per month with gross 10% increase on annual basis

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Delhi University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Delhi University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Delhi University Recruitment 2026 is 25th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 5 vacancies are available for the posts of Training Coordinator, Office Assistant, and Computer Lab Assistant in this Delhi University recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Training Coordinator post?
faq.answer: For the Training Coordinator post, candidates should possess a B.E./B.Tech/MCA degree. An MBA in IT is considered desirable for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The Office Assistant post offers a salary of ₹25,000 per month, with a gross 10% increase on an annual basis.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Delhi University recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on an Interview, which may be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for Delhi University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the Delhi University Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any geographical restrictions for applicants. However, candidates should check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Training Coordinator, Office Assistant, and Computer Lab Assistant are contractual roles under Delhi University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article by clicking on the provided link for the Official Notification PDF.
